summary: Iteration 13: Frontend-only testing of Platform Alert Dialog feature. All 9 requested features verified working correctly.

issues:
HTML nesting warnings in console:

cannot contain nested

,

,
    elements. AlertDialogDescription wraps content in

    tag but contains block-level elements. This is a semantic HTML issue that should be fixed by using

    instead of

    for the description content.

passed_tests: Alert dialog appears when switching from recommended platform (NIOS) to non-recommended platform (UDDI)
Alert dialog appears when switching from recommended platform (NIOS) to non-recommended platform (Hybrid)
Alert dialog does NOT appear when switching back to recommended platform (NIOS from UDDI)
Alert dialog title shows 'Non-Recommended Platform Selected' with warning icon (amber AlertTriangle)
Alert dialog shows which platforms user is switching from/to: 'You are switching from NIOS (recommended) to UDDI'
Alert dialog contains explanation box with 'Why is NIOS recommended?' and 3 bullet points
Explanation bullet points: 'NIOS is ideal for smaller deployments (<50 sites)', 'Provides traditional Grid Master/GMC architecture', 'Best for on-premises infrastructure'
Alert dialog shows warning about role assignments: 'Switching platforms will reset role assignments and may affect your sizing calculations'
Cancel button ('Keep NIOS') closes dialog and keeps original platform selected
Confirm button ('Switch to UDDI' / 'Switch to Hybrid') closes dialog and changes platform
Alert has proper test IDs: platform-alert-dialog, platform-alert-cancel, platform-alert-confirm
Platform mode toggle buttons have proper test IDs: platform-mode-nios, platform-mode-uddi, platform-mode-hybrid
'Not Recommended' badge appears when non-recommended platform is selected
action_items:
MINOR: Fix HTML nesting issue in AlertDialogDescription - replace

wrapper with

or use asChild prop to avoid semantic HTML warnings
critical_code_review_comments: TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 164-199: Platform alert state management correctly implemented with showPlatformAlert, pendingPlatformChange, handlePlatformModeChange, confirmPlatformChange, cancelPlatformChange
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 174-184: handlePlatformModeChange correctly checks if switching FROM recommended TO non-recommended before showing alert
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 501-561: AlertDialog component properly implemented with all required test IDs and dynamic content
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 514-542: Explanation box with conditional bullet points based on recommendedMode works correctly

MINOR ISSUE: AlertDialogDescription (line 510) wraps content in

tag but contains

,

,
    elements causing HTML nesting warnings
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test Customer Frontend' with 4 DCs and 1 Site (NIOS is recommended)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Alert Dialog feature fully verified. Alert appears when switching from recommended (NIOS for 4 DCs, 1 Site) to non-recommended (UDDI or Hybrid). Alert does NOT appear when switching back to recommended. Cancel keeps original platform, Confirm switches platform. All test IDs present: platform-alert-dialog, platform-alert-cancel, platform-alert-confirm. Minor HTML nesting warning in console should be addressed.

platform_alert_dialog.trigger_condition: Switching FROM recommended platform TO non-recommended platform
platform_alert_dialog.no_trigger_condition: Switching TO recommended platform (from any platform)
platform_alert_dialog.title: Non-Recommended Platform Selected

explanation_box.title: Why is {recommended} recommended?
explanation_box.config_info: Based on your configuration of {dcCount} Data Centers and {siteCount} Sites
bullet_points_nios: NIOS is ideal for smaller deployments (<50 sites)

platform_alert_dialog.warning_text: Switching platforms will reset role assignments and may affect your sizing calculations

.screenshots/09_nios_selected_no_alert.png - NIOS selected without alert when switching back
